message:
🌱 spire: Move to GitHub Actions (#1835)

* 🌱 Add spire: Move to GitHub Actions mission

* 🌱 Add spire: Move to GitHub Actions mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "spire-2276-move-to-github-actions",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "spire: Move to GitHub Actions",
+    "description": "Move to GitHub Actions. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current spire deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your spire version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nhelm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working spire installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review spire configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant spire configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire\n```\nTravis has begun charging the project lots of money to run CI/CD. I contacted the CNCF service desk to ask what we should do, and they indicated that we should move to GitHub Actions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Move to GitHub Actions",
+        "description": "This commit sets up GitHub Actions for SPIRE CI per CNCF request.\n\nThe nested rotation test is currently failing due to a problem with the docker workload attestor. The VMs that GitHub runs the Action jobs in ships with a docker that is set up to use custom cgroup names. This is causing the docker workload attestor to not recognize callers in docker containers. I think the fix will be to introduce a second agent config that has the correct matcher defined, and put a switch in the integration\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire\nkubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Move to GitHub Actions\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This commit sets up GitHub Actions for SPIRE CI per CNCF request.\n\nThe nested rotation test is currently failing due to a problem with the docker workload attestor. The VMs that GitHub runs the Action jobs in ships with a docker that is set up to use custom cgroup names. This is causing the docker workload attestor to not recognize callers in docker containers.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "spire",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "spire"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/spiffe/spire/issues/2276",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/spiffe/spire",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/spiffe/spire/pull/2306"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 0,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with spire installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:36:27.256Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

I contacted the CNCF service desk to ask what we should do, and they indicated that we should move to GitHub Actions."
+      },

+        "description": "This commit sets up GitHub Actions for SPIRE CI per CNCF request.\n\nThe nested rotation test is currently failing due to a problem with the docker workload attestor. The VMs that GitHub runs the Action jobs in ships with a docker that is set up to use custom cgroup names. This is causing the docker workload attestor to not recognize callers in docker containers. I think the fix will be to introduce a second agent config that has the correct matcher defined, and put a switch in the integration\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"

+      }

The VMs that GitHub runs the Action jobs in ships with a docker that is set up to use custom cgroup names. This is causing the docker workload attestor to not recognize callers in docker containers.",
